about-hero-k3l4.query: Velmora was founded on a simple premise: beautiful, well-crafted jewelry shouldn't come with a luxury markup. We design every piece in-house, work directly with artisan workshops, and sell exclusively online — cutting out the middlemen so we can offer demi-fine quality at accessible prices. Jewelry Made to Be Worn
